lightsail.disk.AddOns.Description: An array of add-ons for the disk.  If the disk has an add-on enabled when performing a delete disk request, the add-on is automatically disabled before the disk is deleted.

lightsail.disk.AvailabilityZone.Description: The AWS Region and Availability Zone location for the disk (for example, `us-east-1a`).

lightsail.disk.SizeInGb.Description: The size of the disk in GB.

lightsail.disk.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html) in the *AWS CloudFormation User Guide*.  The `Value` of `Tags` is optional for Lightsail resources.
